title: polygala perennis
intro: Polygala perennis, also known as common milkwort or perennial milkwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Polygala perennis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
